title: Tasty Char-Grilled-Yang Bean Banh-Xeo
description: A lazy-sunday Vietnamese dish featuring jammy, springy haricot beans and char-grilled-yang for a high-protein-friendly meal.
instructions: Heat a charcoal grill or pan to high heat.
Slice the Yang into thin strips and brush with Sesame Oil.
Season with Tamarind Paste and stir-fry until charred, about 2 minutes per side.
In a separate skillet, cook Bean Sprouts and Spring Onion in Sesame Oil for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
Prepare Banh Xeo batter according to package instructions.
Heat up the griddle or pan with a thin layer of water, add a spoonful of batter and swirl gently.
Cook each side until golden, about 1 minute per side.
Plate your Banh Xeo and garnish with Char-Grilled-Yang and Stir-Fried Bean Sprouts.
